channel.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

item.title: [GRA3][Cooling System] - Rack GRA0326B03C maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 27, 06:00 - 13:00 UTC

Jun 25, 18:15 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 27/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 27/07/2026 13:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L115B06 maintenance notification

Start time : 22/07/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 22/07/2026 08:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, servers in the rack L115B06 will be temporarily unavailable.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.description:

Jun 11, 16:38 UTC

List of affected racks:

- Rack W17A07
- Rack W17A04
- Rack W17A03
- Rack W17A02
- Rack W17A01

Start time : 16/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 16/07/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : All servers will be unavailable during maintenance.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [YYZ][Dedicated Servers] - Room YYZ0101 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 8, 12:30 - 13:30 UTC

Jun 22, 16:28 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offering, affecting servers in racks listed below :
- Rack YYZ0101B02A
- Rack YYZ0101B02A


Start time : 08/07/2026 12:30 UTC
End time : 08/07/2026 13:30 UTC
Service impact : Customers who have not configured the LACP service may temporarily experience a service interruption.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy for our network infrastructure, we will be upgrading multiple network devices to enhance security and reliability.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Multiple racks maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 2, 23:30 UTC  -  Jul 3, 02:30 UTC

Jun 16, 21:01 UTC

- G107A04
- G107A05
- G107A06

Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be performing maintenance on a network device.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [BHS1][Cooling System] - Rack T01C49 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 2, 11:00 - 19:30 UTC

Jun 27, 03:09 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 02/07/2026 11:00 UTC
End time : 02/07/2026 19:30 UTC
Service impact : The cooling system's efficiency could be temporarily impacted for some servers, which could cause a decreased performance during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

item.title: [BHS1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks T01C48/T01C49/T01C50/T01C51/T01C52/T01C53/T01C54 Incident Notification
item.description:
Jul 1, 08:29 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific racks T01C48/T01C49/T01C50/T01C51/T01C52/T01C53/T01C54.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 01/07/2026 08:11 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the racks T01C48/T01C49/T01C50/T01C51/T01C52/T01C53/T01C54 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [RBX8][Dedicated Servers] - Rack R808R08 Incident Notification
item.description:
Jul 1, 08:17 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Dedicated Servers offer which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 01/07/2026 07:50 UTC
End time : 01/07/2026 08:10 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the rack R808R08 were temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

item.title: [GRA][Virtual Private Servers] - Infrastructure maintenance notification
item.description:
Jul 1, 07:54 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 1, 07:53 UTC

Start time : 01/07/2026 07:30 UTC
End time : 01/07/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : None.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our infrastructure in the GRA region.

Jul 1, 07:31 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Start time : 01/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 01/07/2026 11:00 UTC
Service impact : None.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [BHS1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack T02B02 Incident Notification
item.description:
Jul 1, 05:00 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering in the rack T02B02 has been resolved.

Start time : 01/07/2026 04:26 UTC
End time : 01/07/2026 04:58 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 1, 04:34 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the rack T02B02.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 01/07/2026 04:26 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the specified rack are no longer able to access the public network.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers via public network located on the specified rack.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
